translation.literal_translation: If it be said 'No, because it is a modification-word,' no - because of abundance. (13)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.13: mayat in anandamaya is taken as pracurya, not vikara.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra settles the suffix dispute in favor of Brahman-reference.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit mayat suffix semantics and anandamaya mantra-brahmana continuity framing in records 1.1.056-1.1.063.
